description_long: This shotgun features a modern, tactical design with a predominantly black and gray color scheme. The body is composed of angular and geometric shapes, with a prominent upper receiver and a robust, squared-off stock at the rear. The barrel is short and cylindrical, extending slightly from the front, while the midsection includes a visible ejection port and a rail system on top, likely for mounting optics. The grip is integrated into the lower receiver, and the trigger guard is large and squared, providing ample space for gloved fingers. The overall construction suggests a compact, urban-oriented firearm with ergonomic and functional design elements.
description: A compact, modern shotgun with a black and gray tactical body, short barrel, and squared stock. Features include a rail system, large trigger guard, and angular design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the squared stock, short barrel, and top rail system.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular barrel opening and the narrow width of the shotgun.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the main features of the first side, with clear visibility of the ejection port and stock.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the back of the stock and the overall slim profile of the shotgun.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, short and cylindrical with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: large, squared trigger guard with a robust, angular shape and no visible finger grooves
